name: shortpy-ide
description: Drive Apple's Shortcuts runtime Python compiler and edit-mode plist-to-Python converter from VS Code.

scripts.check: node scripts/sync-package-commands.js --check && node --check scripts/diagnose-shortpy.js && node --check scripts/prepare-bundled-headless-shortcuts.js && node --check src/commandRegistry.js && node --check src/bridge.js && node --check src/connectionState.js && node --check src/editorInsertion.js && node --check src/hostShortcuts.js && node --check src/toolkitState.js && node --check src/toolrenderer.js && node --check src/workflowEditorView.js && node --check src/workflowRoundTrip.js && node --check src/extension.js
scripts.test: node test/diagnostics.test.js && node test/toolrenderer.test.js && node test/manifest.test.js && node test/bridge.test.js && node test/hostShortcuts.test.js && node test/uiState.test.js && node test/workflowEditorView.test.js && node test/workflowRoundTrip.test.js

commands.title: Shortcuts IDE: Build Shortcut From Python
Shortcuts IDE: Validate With Apple Runtime
Shortcuts IDE: Sync With Host Shortcuts
Shortcuts IDE: Open Workflow Plist From Python
Shortcuts IDE: Python To Plist Debug JSON
Shortcuts IDE: Import Plist As Python
Shortcuts IDE: Import iCloud Link As Python

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.bridgeCtlPath.description: Path to bridgectl.py. Leave empty to use the bundled bridge runtime, then a Shortpy IDE workspace bridge as a development fallback.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.toolRendererMetadata.description: Optional path to cached native ToolRenderer interface metadata JSON. Leave empty to use extension storage.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.highlightKnownComman.description: Highlight known Shortcuts action and trigger Python names from cached ToolRenderer metadata.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.writeToDebugConsole.description: Mirror key bridge and Shortpy IDE events into the VS Code Debug Console when available.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.pythonPath.description: Python executable used to run bridgectl.py.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.socket.description: Shortcuts IDE bridge socket path, or auto for bridgectl.py discovery.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.defaultShortcutExten.description: Extension used when saving a shortcut from Python.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.signShortcutExports.description: Sign .shortcut exports with macOS shortcuts sign --mode anyone. .plist exports always remain raw workflow plist bytes.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.shortcutSigningMode.description: Signing mode passed to macOS shortcuts sign for .shortcut exports.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.shortcutsCliPath.description: Path to the macOS shortcuts CLI used for signing. Leave empty to use /usr/bin/shortcuts.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.toolkitSqlitePath.description: ToolKit sqlite used by the bridge/compiler source-of-truth layer. Leave empty to use ~/Library/Shortcuts/ToolKit/Tools-active. The bridge backs it up, rewrites duplicate action/trigger Python names in place, and points Simulator Shortcuts at it.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.bridgeCommandTimeout.description: Maximum time in milliseconds for compile/import/export bridge commands before VS Code reports a timeout.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.bridgeMetadataTimeou.description: Maximum time in milliseconds for ToolRenderer metadata bridge commands before VS Code reports a timeout. Live ToolRenderer refresh can be large after widening the native visibility surface.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.bridgeStatusTimeoutM.description: Maximum time in milliseconds for bridge status checks before VS Code reports a timeout.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.bridgeLaunchTimeoutM.description: Maximum time in milliseconds for Connect To Bridge to build the bridge, boot Simulator, launch Shortcuts, and verify status.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.openSimulatorOnConne.description: Open the visible Simulator app during Connect To Bridge. Disabled by default so the bridge runs headlessly.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.quitSimulatorAppOnHe.description: Quit the visible Simulator app during headless Connect To Bridge if it is already running.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.singleSimulatorOnCon.description: Keep only the selected iOS simulator booted during Connect To Bridge by shutting down other booted iOS simulators.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.autoConvertPlistOnOp.description: Legacy behavior: automatically open a separate Python document when a .shortcut or workflow .plist is opened. The custom editor is the primary UI.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.validateOnSave.description: Validate Python files with the Shortcuts runtime bridge on save and surface compiler errors in Problems.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.validateOnType.description: Validate Python with the Shortcuts runtime bridge while editing. This calls into the live Shortcuts process after a debounce.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.offerOpenInShortcuts.description: Offer to open the saved .shortcut/.plist file after export.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.overwriteSiblingShor.description: Allow Write Sibling Shortcut to overwrite an existing sibling shortcut without prompting.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.headlessShortcutsPat.description: Optional path to a prebuilt Headless Shortcuts binary. Leave empty to build and use the runtime bundled with this extension.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.hostCommandTimeoutMs.description: Maximum time in milliseconds for building or running the host Shortcuts sync helper.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.liveSyncPollInterval.description: Polling interval in milliseconds for host Shortcuts changes while Live Sync is enabled and the linked editor is open.
